allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in {**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}.items\(\) if any\(x in k for x in ['next','supabase','auth']\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in {**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}.items\(\) if 'next' in k or 'react' in k or 'turbo' in k}, indent=2\)\)")
